title: DeepSearch-World: Self-Distillation for Deep Search Agents in a Verifiable Environment
innovation_summary: DeepSearch-World: Self-Distillation for Deep Search Agents in a Verifiable Environment: We present DeepSearch-Evolve, a self-distillation framework for web agents built on DeepSearch-World, a deterministic and verifiable environment with reproducible search and page-reading tools.
